title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tests/test_turn_builder.py (第 150 至 260 行，共 290 行) ---
 150 |     ]
 151 | 
 152 |     result = await engine.compress(
 153 |         messages=messages,
 154 |         strategy=CompressionStrategy.SLIDING_WINDOW,
 155 |         target_ratio=0.4,
 156 |         min_keep=2,
 157 |     )
 158 | 
 159 |     assert result.success
 160 |     assert result.compressed_messages == messages[1:]
 161 |     assert_valid_openai_tool_pairs(result.compressed_messages)
 162 | 
 163 | 
 164 | def test_turn_builder_extracts_phase2_metadata_for_code_error_and_tests():
 165 |     messages = [
 166 |         {
 167 |             "role": "tool",
 168 |             "tool_call_id": "call_meta",
 169 |             "name": "execute_bash",
 170 |             "content": "pytest tests/test_core.py\nFAILED tests/test_core.py::test_x\nTraceback: ValueError in core/engine.py",
 171 |         },
 172 |         {
 173 |             "role": "assistant",
 174 |             "content": "已修改 core/engine.py，并计划继续运行 pytest tests/test_core.py",
 175 |         },
 176 |     ]
 177 | 
 178 |     turns = TurnBuilder().build(messages)
 179 |     orphan_turn = turns[0]
 180 |     assistant_turn = turns[1]
 181 | 
 182 |     assert {"tool", "error", "test", "command"}.issubset(set(orphan_turn.categories))
 183 |     assert "core/engine.py" in orphan_turn.files_touched
 184 |     assert orphan_turn.errors
 185 |     assert orphan_turn.tests
 186 |     assert orphan_turn.importance > 0.35
 187 | 
 188 |     assert {"planning", "code_edit", "test"}.issubset(set(assistant_turn.categories))
 189 |     assert "core/engine.py" in assistant_turn.files_touched
 190 |     assert assistant_turn.importance > 0.5
 191 | 
 192 | 
 193 | @pytest.mark.asyncio
 194 | async def test_keyframe_uses_turn_metadata_and_keeps_tool_pairs_atomic():
 195 |     engine = CompressionEngine()
 196 |     messages = [
 197 |         {"role": "user", "content": "old low value chat"},
 198 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "generic reply"},
 199 |         {"role": "user", "content": "请修改 core/engine.py 并运行测试"},
 200 |         {
 201 |             "role": "assistant",
 202 |             "content": "",
 203 |             "tool_calls": [tool_call("call_edit", "edit_file")],
 204 |         },
 205 |         {
 206 |             "role": "tool",
 207 |             "tool_call_id": "call_edit",
 208 |             "name": "edit_file",
 209 |             "content": "成功修改 core/engine.py",
 210 |         },
 211 |         {
 212 |             "role": "tool",
 213 |             "tool_call_id": "call_orphan",
 214 |             "name": "execute_bash",
 215 |             "content": "orphan should be removed",
 216 |         },
 217 |         {
 218 |             "role": "assistant",
 219 |             "content": "pytest tests/test_engine.py FAILED\nTraceback: AssertionError in tests/test_engine.py",
 220 |         },
 221 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "final recent status"},
 222 |     ]
 223 | 
 224 |     result = await engine.compress(
 225 |         messages=messages,
 226 |         strategy=CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME,
 227 |         target_ratio=0.25,
 228 |         min_keep=2,
 229 |     )
 230 | 
 231 |     assert result.success
 232 |     assert result.strategy == CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME
 233 |     assert messages[3] in result.compressed_messages
 234 |     assert messages[4] in result.compressed_messages
 235 |     assert messages[5] not in result.compressed_messages
 236 |     assert messages[6] in result.compressed_messages
 237 |     assert "error" in result.metadata["selected_categories"]
 238 |     assert "test" in result.metadata["selected_categories"]
 239 |     assert "core/engine.py" in result.metadata["files_touched"]
 240 |     assert_valid_openai_tool_pairs(result.compressed_messages)
 241 | 
 242 | 
 243 | @pytest.mark.asyncio
 244 | async def test_llm_summary_uses_metadata_filtered_summary_candidates_and_recent_complete_turns():
 245 |     captured = {}
 246 | 
 24...
